payload.description:
Observed behavior: scorecard_model_retarget fails the whole procedure when plexus.score.pull raises 'No champion version for score'.

Expected behavior: because this is a bulk scorecard maintenance procedure, a selected score with no champion version should be skipped with a clear row status, and the procedure should continue retargeting other selected scores.

Feature: Scorecard model retarget skips scores without champions

Scenario: Selected score has no champion version
Given a selected score has no champion ScoreVersion
When the scorecard model retarget procedure plans scores
Then that score is marked skipped with the pull error
And the procedure continues planning subsequent scores.

Scenario: All selected scores are skipped
Given no selected score can be retargeted
When the procedure finishes planning
Then it completes with no_changes and reports skipped rows.
payload.title: Skip scores without champion during model retarget
